__warnings.note: Kept Shona 'Mhoro' verbatim — it's Rwen's signature greeting and is recognised across the app (also appears in tips, branding, and welcome flow). Reviewer: confirm this stays Mhoro for French speakers, or flip to 'Bonjour, {{name}} !' if user research shows it confuses early users.
Kept Shona 'Ndine urombo' (I'm sorry) verbatim for the same brand-signature reason. The French explanation follows. Reviewer: confirm or flip to 'Désolé —'.
Same Mhoro decision applied. Reviewer: confirm.

'{{lang}} companion · AI' — kept '{{lang}}' as-is, translated 'companion' to 'compagnon'. The {{lang}} placeholder may render the target language name in French or English depending on i18n wiring upstream.

'tap ⏹ to stop' — translated to 'appuyez sur ⏹'. Reviewer: confirm tu/vous register; we use vous here for the input hint, but tu elsewhere with Rwen. Decide whether the chrome and Rwen's voice should match register.

input.placeholder_convo_active: Conversation en cours — parle ou appuie sur ⏹ pour arrêter

messages.welcome: Mhoro, {{name}} ! Qu'est-ce qui te trotte dans la tête aujourd'hui ?
messages.error_generic: Ndine urombo — quelque chose s'est mal passé. Réessaie.
messages.auto_listen_greeting: Mhoro ! Je t'écoute. Parle quand tu veux.
